periods.label: 23 April 2026 export
periods.summary: Across the supplied exports, 5 brands were analysed. Toyota Slovenija generated the highest impressions, while Toyota Slovenija generated the highest total engagement.

report.summary: During the reviewed export period, the brand published 205 pieces of Instagram content and generated 568.8k impressions. The strongest readout comes from creator-led posts with measurable engagement, while caption analysis highlights the main promoted models and recurring content themes.

community.sentimentSummary: Analysed comments are mostly positive. Positive cues account for 51% of detected sentiment and negative cues for 4%.

positiveExamples.text: To je pa res deja vu na prve dni @avtoportret.si 😄 Srečno novi članici :)

positiveExamples.text: To pa nebo drzalo drugi najbolj prodajen je Skoda octavia, Golf je tretji najbolj prodajen….

The strongest readout comes from creator-led posts with measurable engagement, while caption analysis highlights the main promoted models and recurring content themes.

community.sentimentSummary: Analysed comments are mostly positive. Positive cues account for 64% of detected sentiment and negative cues for 9%.

positiveExamples.text: Pa tudi, ko pogledaš v vzratno ogledalo ali bočno te vseeno zaslepi, vsaj mene ko kakšen tak avtomobil zapelje za mano. Tako, da nič ne pomaga če on ne osvetli tvojega avtomobila, luči v ogledalih še vedno vidiš in te res oslepijo. Vsaj mene.

positiveExamples.text: Dobila za darilo od moža, super avto, uživam v njemu že kakšen mesec. Baje da sem prva v Sloveniji ki ga je dobila 🥰

negativeExamples.text: Žal ne bo nikoli v uporabi. Zabloda tehnologije kar se avtomobilov tiče.  Se lahko pospravi.
